description: Rust application depending on uuid but only using uuid::Uuid::parse_str() for string parsing. parse_str() does not call getrandom::getrandom() — it requires no entropy. getrandom@0.2.11 is in the dependency graph but not reachable from app code.

findings.human_justification: Only uuid::Uuid::parse_str() is used, which is a pure parsing function. It does not invoke getrandom::getrandom() and requires no entropy source.
